svg.title: Battery Analyzer Component Diagram
svg.desc: Component diagram showing Android native layer, Flutter service, persistence, presentation, and backend communication layers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Kotlin BatteryManager plugin work?')
sendPrompt('What tables does the SQLite database have?')
sendPrompt('What does Shared Preferences store in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('What tabs does the Battery Analyzer home screen have?')
sendPrompt('What does the APIService class do in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('What are the three backend API endpoints in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('What ML models does the Battery Analyzer backend use?')
